name: 高家后院
era_style: 明代江南官宦府邸后院
description: 半开放的后院，雕花木门通向内室，院内有小花园或天井，铺青石板。空间连接室内外，适合家庭私密会面，摆放有和离书和襁褓相关物品。
visual_reference: Ming dynasty Chinese courtyard garden behind official mansion, carved wooden doors and screens, stone paved paths, partial interior view, traditional plants, emotional family confrontation setting
visual_prompt_negative: modern garden, tropical plants, people unless needed
atmosphere: 私密情感, 恳求悲伤
lighting: 白天自然天光从上方照下，后院明亮但有门廊阴影
emotional_range: 父亲递和离书的决绝到沈词跪求的绝望与女主复杂情感
